parameters.query:
WITH usr AS (
  INSERT INTO users (telegram_id, display_name, telegram_username)
  VALUES ({{ $json.telegramId }}, '{{ $json.firstName }}', '{{ $json.username }}')
  ON CONFLICT (telegram_id) DO UPDATE SET
    display_name = EXCLUDED.display_name,
    telegram_username = EXCLUDED.telegram_username
  RETURNING id
),
target_date AS (
  SELECT ((NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Kathmandu') - INTERVAL '{{ $json.dateOffset }} days')::DATE AS d
),
txn_count AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(COUNT(*), 0) + 1 AS cnt
  FROM transactions
  WHERE user_id = (SELECT id FROM usr)
    AND date = (SELECT d FROM target_date)
)
INSERT INTO transactions (id, user_id, date, time, amount, category, note, tags, original_message, status)
SELECT,
  usr.id,
  (SELECT d FROM target_date),
  (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Kathmandu')::TIME,
  {{ $json.amount }},
  '{{ $json.category }}',
  '{{ $json.note }}',
  '{{ $json.tagsLiteral }}'::TEXT[],
  '{{ $json.originalMessage }}',
  'active'
FROM usr, txn_count
RETURNING id, amount, category, note, date, time;

WITH usr AS (
  INSERT INTO users (telegram_id, display_name, telegram_username)
  VALUES ({{ $json.telegramId }}, '{{ $json.firstName }}', '{{ $json.username }}')
  ON CONFLICT (telegram_id) DO UPDATE SET display_name = EXCLUDED.display_name
  RETURNING id
),
target AS (
  SELECT id FROM transactions
  WHERE user_id = (SELECT id FROM usr) AND status = 'active'
  ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
),
deleted AS (
  UPDATE transactions SET status = 'deleted', updated_at = NOW()
  WHERE id = (SELECT id FROM target)
  RETURNING id, amount, category, date
)
SELECT
  COALESCE(d.id, 'NONE') AS id,
  COALESCE(d.amount, 0) AS amount,
  COALESCE(d.category, '') AS category,
  d.date,
  CASE WHEN d.id IS NOT NULL THEN 'deleted' ELSE 'not_found' END AS result
FROM (SELECT 1) AS dummy
LEFT JOIN deleted d ON true;

parameters.text:
👋 Welcome to Finance Tracker!

Just message me your expenses naturally:
  "120 food"
  "spent 500 on petrol"
  "chai 40"

Past dates:
  "120 food yesterday"
  "500 petrol 2 days ago"

Commands:
  delete last — Remove last entry
  edit last amount to 150 — Fix last entry
  last was transport not food — Fix category
  help — Show this message

Start tracking! 💰

❓ I didn't understand that.

Send a message like:
  "120 food"
  "spent 500 on petrol"
  "delete last"
  "edit last amount to 200"
  "help"
